speaker: speaker1
text: I am so glad I caught you at home . I need your help !

speaker: speaker1
text: Cafe au lait , cafe latte , cappuccino , cafe mocha ... I can't keep them all straight !

speaker: speaker2
text: Slow down . What are you talking about ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It's about a girl . No , an angel ! I'm going to the coffee shop where she works right now .
